changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.comment: Make ms_user timestamps zone-aware (timestamp -> timestamptz), matching ms_dictionary: users.creation_dt/update_dt, user_stats.update_dt, vault_entries.imported_at. Existing naked values are interpreted as UTC (dev data is throwaway; no prod data yet).

sql.sql: ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN creation_dt TYPE timestamptz USING creation_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN update_dt TYPE timestamptz USING update_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE user_stats ALTER COLUMN update_dt TYPE timestamptz USING update_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE vault_entries ALTER COLUMN imported_at TYPE timestamptz USING imported_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';

ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN creation_dt TYPE timestamp USING creation_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE users ALTER COLUMN update_dt TYPE timestamp USING update_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE user_stats ALTER COLUMN update_dt TYPE timestamp USING update_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE vault_entries ALTER COLUMN imported_at TYPE timestamp USING imported_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';
